title: SELECT results containing the special character " ︠e " is different
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t4 (id UInt32, data String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
SELECT id, data FROM t4 WHERE data IS NULL;
SELECT id, NOT (data >= '︠e') AS comparison FROM t4;
SELECT id, data FROM t4 WHERE data LIKE '%e%' OR data IS NULL;
key_bug_features: SELECT query behavior with special character '︠e'
